message:
chore: tighten warning-test stderr assertion + close infra-coverage bead

Two small follow-ups from the previous round of work.

src/hook.rs:
- The "warn-severity stderr contains WARNING" test now also asserts
  the rule id (`core.git:checkout-dot`) appears in the captured
  stderr. Both assertions include the captured string in the
  failure message so a regression report shows what was actually
  written instead of just "must contain WARNING marker".

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Close `git_safety_guard-gdnt` ("Add comprehensive test coverage for
  infrastructure pack") with the summary the test author left:
  "Added 25 tests across infrastructure pack: ansible (9 new, from 0),
  terraform (5 new, from 2), pulumi (7 new, from 1)." That matches
  the previous infra-pack tests commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
